overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city street in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The player navigates wet asphalt roads, passes industrial containers, crosses intersections with futuristic vehicles, and walks along sidewalks lined with neon signs, graffiti, and pedestrians carrying umbrellas.

events.description: camera turns right to view industrial containers and metal barriers

agents.ego_description: walking down wet city street and turning to inspect industrial containers on the right side

crisscrossing electrical wires between utility poles
tall black pole with traffic signals and yellow warning stripes
large green metal shipping container with rusted edges
scattered cardboard boxes and debris on wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked cyberpunk street with a covered walkway on the right and power lines overhead. The camera walks forward then turns right to reveal industrial containers and barriers. Sparse traffic and wet asphalt dominate the scene with palm trees visible in the distance.

events.description: camera turns left to resume forward direction toward intersection
purple sedan drives through the intersection from right to left

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering a street intersection, navigating around moving vehicles

notable_agents.action: purple sedan driving through the intersection
dark truck waiting at the traffic light

entered.detail: commercial building with red neon 'FOODFARM' signage
elevated metal walkway structure crossing above the street
futuristic purple car with white roof driving through intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera turns back toward the street and approaches a wide intersection. A prominent building with 'FOODFARM' signage stands on the right while a pedestrian overpass spans the road ahead. Vehicles including a distinctive purple sedan navigate the wet roads as the camera prepares to cross.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with graffiti walls and digital advertising

events.description: moving from open intersection onto enclosed sidewalk with graffiti-covered walls
passing by scattered debris and cardboard boxes on the cluttered sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past graffiti walls and digital billboards

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking with umbrella in the rain

entered.detail: concrete barrier covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
tall digital billboard displaying animated advertisements with purple neon
building facade with blue neon Japanese text 'HOテル' signage

segments.scene_description: Moving from the open intersection onto a narrower sidewalk, the scene features a graffiti-covered concrete wall on the left and a glowing digital advertising kiosk on the right. The camera passes scattered debris and approaches a building with blue neon 'HOテル' signage while the pedestrian overpass looms overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with hotel entrance and pedestrians

events.description: pedestrian with large black umbrella passes close to camera on the right
camera turns slightly toward shop entrance with red interior lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through a moderately crowded sidewalk, passing pedestrians with umbrellas and approaching a hotel entrance

notable_agents.action: man with large black umbrella walking ahead in the rain
woman with purple hair standing near a vending machine

entered.detail: blue automated vending machine with glowing display
stacked cardboard boxes with anime character printed on the side
storefront entrance with glowing red interior lighting

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves along a busier sidewalk with moderate pedestrian traffic. The camera passes a man with a black umbrella and a woman with purple hair near a vending machine. The digital advertising kiosk moves closer on the right while the hotel sign recedes into the background. The clip ends as the camera approaches a shop entrance with distinctive red lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-slicked cyberpunk district, transitioning from a desolate industrial area into a densely populated commercial street. It begins on a wet asphalt road beneath overhead power lines, moving past a covered walkway before turning right to reveal industrial containers and distant palm trees. As the camera pivots back toward the street, the environment opens into a wide intersection featuring a pedestrian overpass and a purple sedan gliding past a prominent FoodFarm building. The scene then shifts from the open road onto a narrower sidewalk, passing a graffiti-covered wall and a glowing digital kiosk while moving beneath the looming overpass toward a blue neon hotel sign. Finally, the camera navigates through a crowd of pedestrians with umbrellas and vibrant hair, moving past a vending machine before arriving at a shop entrance bathed in distinctive red lighting.
